title: Sandboxified Mojang Constellation Mobs (SMCM)
description: Mobs from Minecraft: Dungeons and Minecraft Earth given polished functionality to make them fit in Minecraft's sandbox.
body:
## Overview
Sandboxified Mojang Constellation Mobs is a (currently very small) collection of modded mobs that attempt to be flush with Mojang's design in a way that would make their addition to a vanilla playthrough look and feel relatively seamless. New monsters will join the ranks of the Illagers and Monsters that belong in Minecraft's artstyle and have novel abilities and interactions!

## What's in the mod
Currently the only mobs implemented are:
- The **Reclaimed** (formerly [Jungle Zombie](https://minecraft.wiki/w/Dungeons:Jungle_Zombie)) a Zombie found in Jungle biomes covered in vines that poisons you
- The **Frostbitten** (formerly [Frozen Zombie](https://minecraft.wiki/w/Dungeons:Frozen_Zombie)), a Zombie found in very cold biomes, that throws slowing snowballs to close in for an attack!

![The icy Frostbitten and vine-covered Reclaimed stand back-to-back.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a1aeaf9251fcb3229cf26ce32b84152594cf700b.png)

## To be added
Mojang's Constellation includes Minecraft Dungeons, Earth, and various concepts teased throughout the years through Mob Votes. Some planned Mobs, like the Bruiser (counterpart to Minecraft Dungeons' Royal Guard), are to be reimagined, renamed, and/or retextured to shed off the lore of their respective game and be welcomed into their new environment.

## Translation
Thanks to the help of my wonderful friends, this mod supports French, Canadian French, Mexican Spanish, Spanish (Spain), Italian, German, Romanian, and Greek. (Russian on the way!)

## Dependencies
On Fabric, requires [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api).

## Modpacks
Permission is granted! As long as you include this mod as metadata rather than a jar pls+thx. :D
